en: I'm a linguist, so I would totally add, for example, the language of gestures and
our body language, because it's super important, especially if we talk about different cultures.
If we compare, well, I'm currently in Colombia, but I live in Chile, and then I have lots
of friends from Japan, for example, and there are those little things that you have to consider.
You can write an email or an essay or make an amazing presentation, but then when it
comes to real life, you also have to consider those little things like body language and
the gestures, and you have to be very aware of what could be offensive in other cultures
too if you want to be successful in your business.
